summary: M8 user-testing round synthesized. 17 of 17 milestone-owned assertions resolved via unit + integration tests against real local Supabase. 2 GDPR UI assertions (VAL-GDPR-001 visual + VAL-GDPR-002 modal interaction) flagged pending-with-note for the cross-milestone Playwright sweep, same pattern M5–M7 established.

VAL-HARD-001.note: Upstash sliding-window limiter + in-memory fallback; fallback's Map is process-level so tests prove state persistence across imports.

VAL-HARD-002.note: 429 + Retry-After header verified at every limiter site (chat/session, leads, crawl/start, files).

VAL-HARD-003.note: /privacy renders > 1KB server-component body with footer + contact email.

VAL-HARD-005.note: /dpa lists all 7 sub-processors per GDPR Art. 28.

VAL-HARD-006.note: Welcome email fired from /auth/callback via service-role client + ledger period='initial'.

VAL-HARD-007.note: /api/cron/trial-ending queries [+3d, +4d) and fires sendTrialEndingEmail per row; same-day reruns see 23505 duplicates.

VAL-HARD-008.note: maybeSendQuotaWarning fires once per period_start on exact crossing; ledger backs up steady-state band.

VAL-HARD-009.note: stripe webhook handleInvoicePaymentFailed fires sendPaymentFailedEmail with period=invoice.id for retry-safe idempotency.

VAL-HARD-010.note: captureApiError tags environment/user_id/request_id via Sentry.withScope; init gated on DSN; chat/session catch block is the demo callsite.

VAL-HARD-011.note: test.yml with static → unit → e2e jobs, coverage + artifact upload, YAML-invariant test suite pins the shape.

VAL-DEGRADE-001.note: preflightWidgetConfig maps 5xx/network/AbortError → 'degraded'; loader hides bubble + warns once.

VAL-DEGRADE-002.note: Loader schedules 60s retry on 'degraded' / 'silent'; mounts bubble on 'ready' recovery without page reload.

VAL-DEGRADE-003.note: 402 from config endpoint maps to 'silent' — no console log, bubble not mounted.

VAL-GDPR-001.note: DeleteAccountSection mounted at bottom of /dashboard/settings/site (both happy-path and empty-site branches); red panel + button verified structurally. Playwright screenshot deferred per M5-M7 pattern.

VAL-GDPR-002.note: Modal state machine (enable-on-email-match, cancel closes with no side-effects) unit-tested at the API + helper boundary; Playwright visual + click-flow evidence deferred.

VAL-GDPR-003.note: Integration test against real local Supabase proves cascade across profiles/sites/usage_counters/sent_emails/leads/conversations/custom_responses/escalation_rules; other-user-untouched asserted; Stripe cancel callback invoked with stored sub id.

VAL-CROSS-010.note: scripts/reset-my-data.sql proven via integration test: scoped wipe + profile preservation + counter reset + safety gate on missing user.

deferredToExternalServiceBindings: Live Upstash Redis persistence across Vercel cold starts (VAL-HARD-001 prod check — needs UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL set).
Live Resend send logs (VAL-HARD-006..009 prod evidence — needs RESEND_API_KEY set).
Live Sentry event tagging (VAL-HARD-010 prod evidence — needs SENTRY_DSN set).
notes: Destructive ops (GDPR delete, reset-my-data) built + tested but NOT run against Brandon's real account per the mission AGENTS.md escalation rule. Brandon explicitly controls execution.

Cross-milestone Playwright sweep remains the single remaining UI-evidence bucket across all sealed milestones (M2-M8). Tracking total: 2 new this milestone (GDPR-001, GDPR-002) on top of the M5-M7 backlog.
